meta.title: LogiMarket.pl - B2B catalog of warehouse equipment and supplies
meta.description: Forklifts, racking, pallets, packaging and logistics equipment in one place. Hybrid B2B model: RFQ + E-Commerce.

nav.constructionNotice: MARKETPLACE W BUDOWIE / MARKETPLACE UNDER CONSTRUCTION

hero.title: Catalog of warehouse equipment and supplies
hero.description: Forklifts, racking, pallets, packaging and logistics equipment in one place.
hero.modelDescription: Hybrid model: RFQ for heavy equipment, E-Commerce for repeatable items.

catalog.emptyDescription: Check other categories or come back later.
catalog.platformNotice: LogiMarket.pl is a hybrid B2B platform. For heavy equipment, we provide an RFQ model (request for quotation); for repeatable items, we provide an E-Commerce model with a cart. Sales and order fulfillment are handled directly by the partner. LogiMarket.pl is not a party to the transaction.

introsBySlug.regaly-i-systemy-skladowania: Wide selection of warehouse racking and storage systems to optimize your hall space.
introsBySlug.wozki-i-transport-wewnetrzny: Reliable forklifts, pallet jacks, and material handling equipment for load operations.
introsBySlug.wyposazenie-magazynu: Durable workshop furniture, packing tables, and plastic bins for efficient work.
introsBySlug.opakowania-i-materialy-eksploatacyjne: Essential packaging materials, stretch films, wrappers, and transport pallets.
introsBySlug.systemy-bezpieczenstwa-i-oznakowanie: Professional safety barriers, protectors, warehouse marking, and PPE.

offers.ecommerceNotice: This product is available in the E-Commerce model. Add it to the cart and submit a B2B order.
offers.rfqNotice: This offer requires an individual quote. Send an RFQ inquiry and the partner will prepare an offer.

rfq.title: Request for quote (RFQ)
rfq.successDescription: The partner will prepare a B2B quote and contact you.
rfq.descriptionSuffix: The inquiry will go directly to the partner.
rfq.consent: By submitting the form, you agree to share your data with the partner.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyDescription: Add products from the catalog to submit a B2B order.

checkout.title: B2B order
checkout.successDescription: Your B2B order has been saved. Our team will contact you.
checkout.description: Complete the form to submit an order. This is not an online transaction - our team will verify availability.
checkout.legalNote: Submitting an order is not an online transaction. Our team will verify availability and contact you.

footer.description: B2B marketplace for warehouse equipment and supplies. An offer catalog connecting buyers with verified partners.
footer.partnerPrompt: Want to list your products? Contact us:
footer.copyrightSuffix: Sales are handled directly by partners.

system.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

procurementAreas.title: Procurement areas
procurementAreas.subtitle: Go to the most important product groups for warehousing, intralogistics, and packaging.
